attributes.action: Stop politicians drinking alcohol in work hours
attributes.additional_details: Why should our politicians who represent us be allowed to drink alcohol at work. Noone else is allowed to be drinking at work and these people are running our country and economy.
attributes.background: To stop politicians using alcohol whilst at work in the house of commons.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Ban the sale and consumption of alcohol in House of Commons venues
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/768417
